docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-04-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAGRO, ANDREA
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY PEREZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT MAGRO, ANDREA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF LUIS PEREZ. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ANDREA MAGRO ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT MAGRO, ANDREA
